command.biome-snapshot.start: The game has been paused. Biome screenshot is being generated. Please wait a moment...
command.biome-snapshot.fail: The screenshot of the biome failed to save
command.biome-snapshot.config.biome_colo: The color of %s has been set to %s (0x%s)
The color of %s has been removed
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.biome-sna: This mod provides a command to export the biome or terrain status of a specified coordinate range as a flat map (requires level 4 admin privileges).
